message:
feat(mermaid): add sequence diagram control block cluster layout (bd-2kn9a)

Implement compute_sequence_clusters() which creates layout cluster boxes
for sequence diagram control blocks (loop/alt/opt/par/critical/break/rect).

Each control block's vertical extent is derived from the edge indices it
spans, and horizontal extent covers all participant nodes with cluster
padding. The bounding box computation now includes these clusters.

Also adds two focused layout tests:
- layout_sequence_with_control_block_clusters
- layout_sequence_no_control_blocks_no_clusters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
